title: Bridge Essay: Examining interpersonal self-transcendence as a potential mechanism linking meditation and social outcomes.
concept: Self-transcendence — mystical experience, cosmic consciousness, awe, numinous in neuroscience.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Self-transcendence — mystical experience, cosmic consciousness, awe, numinous in neuroscience.

**Examining interpersonal self-transcendence as a potential mechanism linking meditation and social outcomes.** - Curr Opin Psychol (2019). DOI: 10.1016/j.copsyc.2018.12.007. PMID: 30639834. Distinct types of meditation practice addressed in this review can help cultivate skills people may bring to later social interactions. We examine self-transcendence, or the drive to benefit others beyond the self, as a key mechanism through which meditation may promote positive social outcomes.
